blockers.description: Pinnacle JS bundle no longer contains X-Api-Key — key must be manually cached
blockers.workaround: Get key from browser DevTools Network tab, save to data/.pinnacle_key_cache

human_actions_pending.action: Extract Pinnacle X-Api-Key from browser DevTools and save to data/.pinnacle_key_cache
human_actions_pending.context: The JS bundle extraction approach fails because Pinnacle no longer embeds the API key in client-side JS. The key is needed for the X-Api-Key header (courtesy header for guest API).

decisions.decision: Pivoted from Playwright session manager to guest API (guest.api.arcadia.pinnacle.com)
Fixed bundle URL from pinnacle.com to pinnacle.ca
decisions.rationale: User pointed out they use .ca domain

next_action: User provides Pinnacle API key via browser DevTools, saves to data/.pinnacle_key_cache, then resume UAT from test 1 of 8
context_notes: Phase 04.1 execution complete, code review fixes applied, verification passed. UAT started but blocked on first test because _extract_key_from_bundle() fails — Pinnacle no longer embeds X-Api-Key in JS bundles. Phase 05 (frontend integration) was already executed in a prior session — UAT covers both phases in a combined 8-test suite.
